name: io.github.leocelis/eif
title: Epistemic Integrity Framework (EIF)
description: Runtime gate for AI agent claims. Catches confident-but-wrong outputs: sycophantic drift, circular self-validation, causal errors. Runs locally.

headers.description: API key for the EIF hosted server. Request one at https://github.com/leocelis/eif/discussions
